evals.prompt: Generate ad copy for Retreat House. Creative brief exists at Desktop/Retreat House/Retreat House/_engine/working/creative-brief.json. Both Google and Meta, 4 campaigns, phased strategy.
evals.expected_output: Google RSAs for Brand Search + Non-Brand Search (4 ad groups). Meta primary text + headlines for Prospecting and Retargeting. Image prompts using architectural photography prefix. Video storyboards with voiceover for 2 video ads. All character limits respected.

assertions.name: rsa_character_limits
assertions.description: All Google headlines ≤ 30 chars, all descriptions ≤ 90 chars, path fields ≤ 15 chars

assertions.name: meta_text_limits
assertions.description: Primary text flagged if over 125 chars, headlines ≤ 40 chars, descriptions ≤ 30 chars

assertions.name: image_prompts_use_prefix
assertions.description: Image prompts start with or incorporate the image_gen_prompt_prefix from creative brief

assertions.name: video_has_vo_script
assertions.description: Video storyboards include clean voiceover text without stage directions or parentheticals

assertions.name: ab_variants_generated
assertions.description: A/B test variants from creative brief ab_testing.test_pairs are reflected in copy variants

assertions.name: proof_elements_integrated
assertions.description: Dezeen, ATHA, $74K/yr stat appear naturally in ad copy, not forced

evals.prompt: Write Meta ad copy for a local restaurant in Gurugram. No creative brief exists. Budget $1500/month. They do North Indian cuisine with a rooftop setting. Run in standalone mode.
evals.expected_output: Guided questions asked first. PAS framework for prospecting. Instagram-optimized aspect ratios for image prompts. Reels-first video storyboard. Local targeting language.

assertions.name: standalone_questions_asked
assertions.description: 6 guided questions asked before copy generation — product, platform, personas, hooks, proof, brand voice

assertions.name: pas_framework_used
assertions.description: Prospecting copy follows PAS (Problem-Agitate-Solution) framework

assertions.name: instagram_optimized
assertions.description: Image prompts include 4:5 and 9:16 aspect ratios for Instagram feed and stories/reels

assertions.name: meta_only_output
assertions.description: No Google RSA or Google CSV generated — Meta only

assertions.name: local_language
assertions.description: Copy includes local/geographic references appropriate for Gurugram audience

evals.prompt: Generate Google Ads copy only for a B2B SaaS company. Standalone mode. Product: project management tool for agencies, $49/user/month. Google Search only, no Meta.
evals.expected_output: Feature-Benefit-Proof framework for RSAs. Professional tone. 15 headlines per ad group with character limits. No video storyboards needed. No Meta CSV.

assertions.name: feature_benefit_proof
assertions.description: RSA headlines and descriptions follow Feature-Benefit-Proof framework

assertions.name: fifteen_headlines
assertions.description: Each RSA has 15 distinct headlines, all ≤ 30 characters

assertions.name: b2b_professional_tone
assertions.description: Copy uses professional B2B language — no casual/playful tone, focuses on efficiency/ROI/team productivity

assertions.name: google_only_output
assertions.description: No Meta CSV, no Reels/Stories image prompts — Google assets only

assertions.name: price_point_messaging
assertions.description: $49/user price point referenced in at least some headlines/descriptions

evals.prompt: Write ad copy for an e-commerce fashion brand. Creative brief exists. Both platforms. They have 30+ SKUs across 3 collections. Catalog/carousel campaigns on Meta, Shopping + Search on Google.
evals.expected_output: Multiple RSAs for different product categories. Carousel copy with per-card headlines. Product-specific image prompts. Collection-level messaging angles.

assertions.name: multi_product_rsa
assertions.description: Separate RSAs per product category/collection, not one generic RSA

assertions.name: carousel_copy
assertions.description: Carousel ad copy includes per-card headlines that tell a sequential story or highlight different features

assertions.name: product_specific_prompts
assertions.description: Image prompts vary by product/collection — not one generic prompt for all

assertions.name: shopping_feed_alignment
assertions.description: Google copy aligns with Shopping campaign structure — product titles, descriptions match feed optimization

assertions.name: meta_csv_variants
assertions.description: Meta CSV includes multiple ad variants with A/B labels per collection

evals.prompt: Generate ad copy for Ananda Wellness Retreat. Creative brief exists. Meta only. 7-day yoga retreat, $1200/person. Seasonal peaks Oct-Mar.
evals.expected_output: BAB framework for transformation narrative. Video storyboards with voiceover for retreat experience. Reels-optimized vertical prompts. Seasonal urgency in copy. Testimonial-driven retargeting.

assertions.name: bab_framework
assertions.description: Prospecting copy follows Before-After-Bridge framework — transformation narrative (stressed → renewed → book the retreat)

assertions.name: video_storyboard_complete
assertions.description: Video storyboard has 4-6 frames with visual, text overlay, voiceover, motion, music for each

assertions.name: vo_clean_for_ai
assertions.description: Voiceover script is clean text — no parentheticals, no stage directions, natural contractions, short sentences

assertions.name: seasonal_messaging
assertions.description: Copy references seasonal availability or urgency appropriate for Oct-Mar peak

assertions.name: reels_vertical_prompts
assertions.description: Image prompts include 9:16 vertical compositions for Reels/Stories placement

evals.name: Gate A + Gate B — gated brief with offerings mismatch
evals.prompt: Generate ad copy for Living Flow Yoga (live-stream campaign). Creative brief carries do_not_launch_until_phase_0_complete: true and phase_0_prerequisites with GATED status for 'standalone digital SKU' and '7-day free trial'. Brief lists 'Pregnancy / Pre-Postnatal' as a persona based on AU keyword volume. {client-root}/_engine/wiki/offerings.md documents only Vinyasa Flow / Yin / Beginners / Yang to Yin — no prenatal yoga, no free trial in MindBody.
evals.expected_output: Two ad-copy-report files generated (best-case + current-state). Production CSV strips 'free trial' / 'prenatal' / 'chair yoga' claims. Validator passes Gate A (output split detected) and Gate B (no unverified service claims in production files). Gate Audit section in report confirms triggers + stripped phrases.

assertions.name: gate_a_dual_output
assertions.description: Both ad-copy-best-case.md and ad-copy-current-state.md generated when do_not_launch_until_phase_0_complete is true (legacy `*-ad-copy-best-case.md` / `*-ad-copy-current-state.md` accepted as backwards-compat)

assertions.name: gate_a_csv_strip
assertions.description: Production google-ads.csv contains zero matches against phase_0_prerequisites[].claim_phrases (free trial, 7-day free trial, etc.)

assertions.name: gate_b_offerings_check
assertions.description: Validator scans copy for service-claim phrases (prenatal, chair yoga, kids yoga, trimester-safe, etc.) and CRITICAL-fails any phrase not in offerings.md

assertions.name: gate_b_reframe_or_drop
assertions.description: Skill output reframes 'Pregnancy / Pre-Postnatal' persona — either drops it entirely or replaces with a verified-offering-aligned persona (e.g., Beginners-only)

assertions.name: gate_audit_section
assertions.description: Ad copy report includes a 'Gate Audit (auto-generated)' section listing Gate A triggers + stripped phrases + Gate B verified/failed claims

assertions.name: validator_exit_nonzero
assertions.description: If gates are violated, validate_output.py exits with non-zero status — production must not ship

evals.name: Refresh Mode — fatigued creative rotation
evals.prompt: Thrive Retreats: post-launch-optimization flagged Emily_Teacher_Training_Hero_v1 as URGENT fatigue (frequency 3.7, CTR decline 42%, CPA up 68%). Run ad-copywriter in Refresh Mode to generate 2+ replacement variants per the rotation-brief.json.

assertions.name: refresh_mode_detected
assertions.description: Skill output explicitly states 'Refresh Mode — 1 fatigued creative being rotated' or equivalent

assertions.name: min_variants_generated
assertions.description: At least 2 replacement variants per fatigued creative (strategy_guardrails.min_new_variants_per_fatigued)

assertions.name: keep_constraints_respected
assertions.description: New variants use the same framework (BAB), same persona, same CTA type as original

assertions.name: change_constraints_applied
assertions.description: New variants have a different hook angle, different imagery direction, or different proof element from the original

assertions.name: refresh_source_label
assertions.description: Every new copy block carries [REFRESH] source label (distinct from [BRIEF]/[GENERATED]/[ADAPTED])

assertions.name: versioned_ad_names
assertions.description: New ad names use version suffix pattern (_v2, _v3) preserving the original naming stem

assertions.name: ab_test_pairing
assertions.description: Output CSV includes both original + replacement rows so campaign-setup can ship as an A/B test

assertions.name: what_changed_block
assertions.description: Each new variant has a brief 'What changed and why' explanation for client rotation conversation

assertions.name: incremental_csv_not_full_rebuild
assertions.description: Google/Meta CSVs contain only refresh rows, not a full campaign rewrite

evals.name: FORMAT-ASPECT-CAROUSEL-1-1 — carousel aspect-ratio enforcement
evals.prompt: Generate ad copy + image prompts for a creative whose creative-brief.json sets `format_priority: ['carousel_5_card', 'lp_redirect_carousel']`. Skill must author every card at 1:1 (1080×1080) — never 4:5. Validator must CRITICAL-fail any prompt where format includes 'carousel' but aspect_ratio != '1:1'.

assertions.name: all_carousel_cards_1_1
assertions.description: Every prompt for the carousel creative has aspect_ratio = '1:1' in both spec-prose ('1:1 square' / '1080×1080') and JSON (composition.aspect_ratio = '1:1')

assertions.name: no_4_5_for_carousel
assertions.description: Zero prompts in the carousel creative reference 4:5 / 1080×1350 / 'vertical' aspect — Meta unit-of-card mandate

assertions.name: audit_table_aspect_consistency
assertions.description: image-prompts.md audit table shows uniform aspect ratio across all carousel-card rows

assertions.name: validator_format_aspect_check
assertions.description: validate_output.py validate_format_aspect_consistency() runs and produces zero CRITICAL on a correct 1:1 carousel run

assertions.name: validator_catches_mismatch
assertions.description: If a prompt for the same carousel creative is authored at 4:5, validate_format_aspect_consistency() emits a CRITICAL referencing the prompt + format + expected vs actual aspect

assertions.name: single_image_4_5_allowed
assertions.description: For a sibling creative whose format_priority is single_image / feed (not carousel), 4:5 is accepted without CRITICAL — validator only enforces 1:1 when format substring includes 'carousel'

evals.name: CAROUSEL-CARD-COUNT-MATCH — N-card spec enforced
evals.prompt: Generate image prompts for a creative whose creative-brief.json sets `format_priority: ['carousel_5_card', 'single_image']`. Skill must author exactly 5 prompts with contiguous CARD-1, CARD-2, CARD-3, CARD-4, CARD-5 IDs. Validator must CRITICAL-fail any of: count mismatch (e.g. 4 cards authored), missing index (CARD-1, 2, 4, 5 with no CARD-3), or extra index (CARD-1..5 + CARD-6).

assertions.name: exactly_n_cards_authored
assertions.description: image-prompts.md contains exactly N `{creative_id}-CARD-K` prompts where N matches the digit in carousel_N_card pattern

assertions.name: contiguous_card_indices
assertions.description: CARD-K indices are 1, 2, 3, ..., N with no gaps (e.g. no skip from CARD-2 to CARD-4 missing CARD-3)

assertions.name: no_extra_cards_beyond_n
assertions.description: No CARD-K with K > N (extra cards beyond brief spec are CRITICAL — over-delivery is also a contract violation)

assertions.name: validator_card_count_check
assertions.description: validate_carousel_card_count() runs and produces zero CRITICAL on a correct N-card carousel

assertions.name: validator_catches_undercount
assertions.description: If only N-1 cards authored, validator emits CRITICAL naming the missing CARD index and the expected count from carousel_N_card

assertions.name: validator_catches_index_gap
assertions.description: If count is correct but indices have a gap (e.g. CARD-1, 2, 4, 5, 6 with no CARD-3), validator emits CRITICAL naming the missing index

assertions.name: soft_carousel_warning_only
assertions.description: For `lp_redirect_carousel` or bare `carousel` (no _N_card pattern), validator emits WARNING not CRITICAL — count not explicit in spec

evals.name: VOICE-LIBRARY-COMPLIANCE — bedrock voice anchoring across all client copy
evals.prompt: Generate ad copy + image prompts for a client whose `_engine/wiki/voice-library.json` carries headline_patterns, trust_line_template, cta_verb_noun_pairs, voice_rules.forbidden_phrases, and campaign_type_anchor_pattern.event = must_appear_on_every_variant. Brief carries event_facts.canonical_string + per-creative voice_anchor.pattern_id + cta_verb_noun_pair.

assertions.name: event_fact_anchor_on_every_variant
assertions.description: Every prompt's text-elements (heading + trust_line + cta) contains ≥80% token overlap with event_facts.canonical_string. validate_voice_library_compliance() emits zero CRITICAL on a correct run.

assertions.name: max_headline_words_respected
assertions.description: No heading exact_copy exceeds voice_rules.max_headline_words. CRITICAL on violation.

assertions.name: no_forbidden_phrases
assertions.description: No copy in image-prompts.md OR ad-copy-report.md contains any voice_rules.forbidden_phrases. CRITICAL on hit.

assertions.name: cta_verb_noun_specificity
assertions.description: CTA pills match voice-library cta_verb_noun_pairs; generic 'Reserve now' / 'Learn More' on >40% of carousel cards = WARNING.

assertions.name: headline_pattern_compliance
assertions.description: Generated headlines broadly match the structure / max_words of the brief's voice_anchor.pattern_id.

assertions.name: missing_voice_library_emits_warning
assertions.description: If voice-library.json is absent, validator emits WARNING (not CRITICAL) and points to business-analysis Step 8.

assertions.name: multi_program_path_resolution
assertions.description: Validator finds voice-library.json at single-program path OR at client-root path (multi-program) without manual config.
